subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh lớp 4

questions.question: What does 'kitchen' mean? (Từ 'kitchen' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'phòng ngủ'? ('phòng ngủ' tiếng Anh là gì?)
What does 'sunny' mean? (Từ 'sunny' nghĩa là gì?)
Complete the weather word: It's ___. (Trời mưa — điền tính từ thời tiết)
What can a bird do? (Con chim có thể làm gì?)
Match the room with its meaning (Nối phòng với nghĩa)
Complete: 'I ___ swim very well.' (Em có thể bơi rất giỏi)
Answer 'Can you sing?' when you can (Trả lời 'Can you sing?' khi em biết hát)
What is the weather usually like in summer? (Mùa hè thời tiết thường thế nào?)
Write 'cái áo sơ mi' in English (Viết 'cái áo sơ mi' bằng tiếng Anh): ___
What does the question 'What time is it?' mean? (Câu 'What time is it?' nghĩa là gì?)
Match the activity with its meaning (Nối hoạt động với nghĩa)

questions.passage: My name is Tom. There are four rooms in my house: a living room, a kitchen, a bedroom and a bathroom. I like my bedroom best because it is big and bright.
questions.question: How many rooms are there in Tom's house? (Nhà Tom có mấy phòng?)

questions.passage: My name is Tom. There are four rooms in my house: a living room, a kitchen, a bedroom and a bathroom. I like my bedroom best because it is big and bright.
questions.question: Which room does Tom like best? (Tom thích phòng nào nhất?)

questions.passage: My name is Tom. There are four rooms in my house: a living room, a kitchen, a bedroom and a bathroom. I like my bedroom best because it is big and bright.
questions.question: Why does Tom like that room? (Vì sao Tom thích phòng đó?)
options: because it is big and bright
